title: Toggle between active, inactive, and all automations

posts.author: Michael-PT (Michael Albers)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to suggest to add a toggle on the automations page that toggles between active, inactive, and all automations.

Reason for this suggestion is that when I am creating a new board or flow between boards or groups, I notice (as a new user) I need to experiment quite a lot with automations to see what gets the desired result(s). This means the list of automations is growing sometimes quite rapidly. Just focussing on only active or inactive automations would be much clearer.

posts.author: Michael-PT (Michael Albers)
posts.cookedHtml: Just figured some kind of tick bocks that marks an automation as final version might be interesting too so you can filter toggle ‘final versions’ of these automations as well.
